interfaces.name: getHomePageContent
interfaces.description: Get hero copy and core benefit highlights for the home page.

interfaces.name: getPlannerWeeks
interfaces.description: List available weeks for the Weekly Workout Planner (e.g., 'Mon 4 – Sun 10').

interfaces.name: getWeeklyPlannerSchedule
interfaces.description: Get the current weekly schedule and assigned workouts for a specific planner week.

interfaces.name: searchPlannerWorkouts
interfaces.description: Search available workout session templates to add into the Weekly Workout Planner, typically filtered by category and duration under 45 minutes.

interfaces.name: addWorkoutToPlanner
interfaces.description: Assign a specific workout session to a day in the selected planner week, creating a weekly schedule if needed.

interfaces.name: removeWorkoutFromPlanner
interfaces.description: Remove an existing workout entry from the Weekly Workout Planner.

interfaces.name: getCalorieCalculatorOptions
interfaces.description: Get available options for gender, activity level, and goals for the Calorie & Macro Calculator.

interfaces.name: calculateCaloriePlan
interfaces.description: Calculate daily calorie and macro targets based on user inputs and store the calculation.

interfaces.name: emailCaloriePlan
interfaces.description: Submit the 'Email me this plan' form for a previously calculated calorie plan.

interfaces.name: getNewsletterOptions
interfaces.description: Get selectable options for focus areas, email frequency, and notification topics in the newsletter section.

interfaces.name: subscribeToNewsletter
interfaces.description: Create a newsletter subscription with focus areas, email frequency, and topic preferences.

interfaces.name: getFaqPreview
interfaces.description: Get a small preview of featured FAQ items for display on the home page.

interfaces.name: getPricingPlans
interfaces.description: Get subscription plans for the Pricing page in either monthly or annual billing view.

interfaces.name: getPlanDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a selected subscription plan including feature breakdown and comparison highlights.

interfaces.name: choosePlanForCheckout
interfaces.description: Select a subscription plan and billing period to initiate a checkout session.

interfaces.name: getTrialSignupContext
interfaces.description: Get plan summary data needed on the Trial Signup page header for a given plan.

interfaces.name: submitTrialSignup
interfaces.description: Submit the 14-day free trial signup form for a selected plan.

interfaces.name: getCheckoutSummary
interfaces.description: Get the summary of the currently selected plan and checkout session for the Checkout page.

interfaces.name: confirmCheckoutSelection
interfaces.description: Confirm the selected plan and proceed from the Checkout page.

interfaces.name: getWorkoutFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get options for Level, Equipment, Location/Type, and Sessions per week filters on the Workouts page.

interfaces.name: searchWorkoutPlans
interfaces.description: Filter and list workout plans on the Workouts page based on selected filters.

interfaces.name: getWorkoutPlanDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a single workout plan, including weekly structure and typical session duration.

interfaces.name: saveWorkoutPlan
interfaces.description: Save or favorite a workout plan to the user's 'My Plans' list.

interfaces.name: getMySavedWorkoutPlans
interfaces.description: Get the list of workout plans the user has saved under 'My Plans'.

interfaces.name: removeSavedWorkoutPlan
interfaces.description: Remove a workout plan from the 'My Plans' list.

interfaces.name: setActiveWorkoutPlan
interfaces.description: Mark one of the saved workout plans as the active/current plan.

interfaces.name: getLiveClassFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get selectable filter options for the Live Classes page, including time ranges, durations, ratings, and class types.

interfaces.name: searchLiveClasses
interfaces.description: Search upcoming live classes for a given date using time, duration, rating, and type filters.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: ISO date string for the selected day

interfaces.name: getLiveClassDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information about a specific live class, including whether it meets time, duration, and rating criteria.

interfaces.name: bookLiveClass
interfaces.description: Book a spot in a live class from its detail page.

interfaces.name: getFaqPageContent
interfaces.description: Get initial FAQ content for the FAQ & Help page, including featured items and categories.

interfaces.name: searchFaqItems
interfaces.description: Search FAQ items by a free-text query (e.g., 'pause membership').

interfaces.name: startChatFromFaq
interfaces.description: Open the support chat widget from the FAQ section and create or reuse a chat session with source 'faq_page'.

interfaces.name: sendChatMessage
interfaces.description: Send a message in the currently open chat session (session managed internally).

interfaces.name: getAboutPageContent
interfaces.description: Get mission, training philosophy, team members, and social proof for the About page.

interfaces.name: getContactPageContent
interfaces.description: Get contact information and social links for the Contact page.

interfaces.name: submitContactForm
interfaces.description: Submit a general inquiry or support request via the Contact page form.

interfaces.name: getHowItWorksContent
interfaces.description: Get step-by-step explanation of how the app works, including trials, subscriptions, and progress tracking.

interfaces.name: getTermsOfServiceContent
interfaces.description: Get the Terms of Service content for display, including subscription and pause policies.

interfaces.name: getPrivacyPolicyContent
interfaces.description: Get the Privacy Policy content, including information about data collection and progress data retention.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateWeeklySchedule
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or create a WeeklyWorkoutSchedule for a given PlannerWeek for the single user.

helperFunctions.name: _getCurrentCheckoutSession
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to retrieve the current CheckoutSession for the single user, creating it when a plan is chosen.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateChatSession
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get or create a ChatSession for the single user and originating page (e.g., faq_page).

helperFunctions.name: _getSingleUserContext
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to manage single-user state across planner, saved plans, checkout, calorie calculations, and newsletter subscriptions.
